title: Laravel Geliştirici
description: Mersin Ofisimizde Laravel Yazılım Geliştirici Arıyoruz! Sadece Mersin’in değil bölgemizin ileri gelen teknoloji şirketlerinden biri olan Eterna Teknoloji ve grup şirketlerinde yenilikçi projelere imza atarken, ekibimizin büyümesine liderlik edecek bir Laravel Yazılım Geliştirici arıyoruz. Şirket Hakkında: Mersin merkezli Ar-Ge odaklı bir yazılım firmasıyız; web, mobil, siber güvenlik, yapay zeka ve elektronik çözümler geliştiriyoruz. Genç ve yenilikçi ekibimizle endüstri-standardı teknoloji ve metodolojileri kullanıyoruz. Şirket kültürümüz öğrenmeyi, dayanışmayı ve mühendislik mükemmelliğini teşvik eder. Aranan Nitelikler: En az Bilgisayar veya Yazılım Mühendisliği lisans mezunu, Mersin'de ikâmet ediyor olmak, İyi derecede İngilizce, En az 3 yıl Laravel Framework'ü ile web uygulamaları geliştirmek, PHP’de iyi seviye bilgiye sahip, Diğer Modern PHP frameworkleri (Symfony vb.) ve RESTful / GraphQL API mimarileri konusunda deneyim, Versiyon kontrol sistemlerinde (Git) uzmanlık ve kod standartlaştırma araçlarının (Lint, Prettier vb.) aktif kullanımı, MVC mimarisi ile ilgili derinlemesine bilgi sahibi. Tercih Edilen Nitelikler (Nice-to-Have): Yüksek trafikli sistemlerde performans tuning ve veritabanı (MySQL/PostgreSQL) optimizasyonu deneyimi, Ön yüz teknolojilerine (HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, TypeScript, React veya Vue.js) aşinalık, Mikroservis mimarileri ve olay tabanlı sistemler hakkında bilgi, Mentorluk ve eğitim süreçlerine katkı sağlama tutkusu. Görev ve Sorumluluklar: Adaydan beklentimiz, yazılım geliştirme süreçlerinde sorunsuz bir şekilde rol üstlenmesi: Laravel ile yazılmış mevcut projeleri sürdürülebilir hale getirmek, geliştirmek; gerektiğinde Laravel benzeri modern framework’ler ile refaktör yapmak ve kod kalitesini artırmak. En az bir ek dilde (Python, Node.js, Java, Go veya C# gibi) üretim tecrübesi; farklı dillerde yazılmış mikrosistemleri entegre etmek ve API mimarileri tasarlamak. Git tabanlı versiyon kontrol, kod gözden geçirme ve CI/CD süreçlerinin (Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, GitHub Actions) kurulması ve işletilmesi. Takım içinde DevOps kültürünü benimsetmek; Docker/Kubernetes ve bulut ortamlarındaki dağıtımları yönetmek. Takım üyelerini mentörlük ile desteklemek, teknik bilgi aktarmak ve kod standartları için Lint benzeri araçların kullanımını teşvik etmek. Performans ve veritabanı optimizasyonu çalışmalarına liderlik etmek. Neden Biz? Yenilikçi ve özgün projelerle çalışma fırsatı. Sürekli öğrenmeyi teşvik eden eğitim programları. Rekabetçi maaş ve yan haklar. Dinamik ve işbirliğine dayalı bir çalışma ortamı. Eterna Teknoloji ile Geleceğe Birlikte Yön Verin! Eğer siz de yenilikçi projelerde yer almak, kendinizi sürekli geliştirmek ve dinamik bir ekipte çalışmak istiyorsanız, Eterna Teknoloji ve grup şirketlerinde sizin için bir yer var. Başvurularınızı bekliyoruz!

title: Software Engineer - Backend (Remote)
description: Role : Backend Engineer Location : Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type: Contract Payout : $20 - $70/hour Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Backend Engineer to work on a contract basis. The role involves building and maintaining scalable backend systems to support high-performance applications. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to implement efficient APIs and data pipelines. Key Responsibilities: • Design, develop, and deploy robust backend services using modern frameworks and tools. • Optimize system performance, scalability, and reliability for global users. • Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code following best practices. • Debug and resolve issues in production environments with a focus on uptime. • Participate in code reviews and contribute to architectural decisions. Required Skills & Qualifications: • Proficiency in backend programming languages such as Python, Java, or Go. • Experience with RESTful and GraphQL API development and integration. • Strong understanding of databases (SQL and NoSQL) and query optimization. • Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes). • Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and version control systems like Git. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Software Development | Technology, Information and Internet | IT Services and IT Consulting | Information Services industry, contributing to the development of high-impact backend systems. The contract includes flexibility to work across time zones and deliver solutions that scale globally. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!

title: Full Stack Software Engineer
description: Full Stack Software Engineer Sektör: Yazılım Çalışma Şekli: Hibrit Giderek büyüyen ve ölçeklenen sistemlerimizi bir üst seviyeye taşımak için, mikro servis mimarisine hakim, Go (Golang) ile veri yoğun uygulamalar geliştirme konusunda deneyimli ve modern frontend pratiklerini benimsemiş bir Full Stack Software Engineer arıyoruz! Eğer güçlü bir mühendislik arka planına sahipseniz, dağıtık sistemlerin heyecan verici zorluklarını çözmek ve baştan sona ürün geliştirmek istiyorsanız, ekibimizin bir parçası olmaya davetlisiniz. Rol ve Sorumluluklar * Mikro servis mimarisi altında yüksek performanslı, ölçeklenebilir ve güvenilir servisler geliştirmek. * Büyük veri setleri ve gerçek zamanlı veri akışları için optimize edilmiş veri tabanı ve kuyruk yapılarını yönetmek. * Frontend tarafında, React kullanarak Feature-Based mimariyle sürdürülebilir, modüler ve temiz arayüzler inşa etmek. * Uygulamaların containerize edilmesi ve yayına alınması süreçlerinde aktif rol oynamak. * Ekiple birlikte teknik tasarımlar yapmak, kod kalitesini artıracak refactor süreçlerine katkıda bulunmak. Teknik Nitelikler ve Beklentiler * Eğitim: Üniversitelerin Bilgisayar Mühendisliği (veya benzeri mühendislik) bölümlerinden mezun. * Mimari Deneyim: Mikro servis mimarisi tasarımı ve implementasyonunda pratik tecrübe sahibi. * Frontend: React ekosistemine hakim, büyük ölçekli projelerde Feature-Based Architecture disipliniyle çalışmış. * Veri Tabanı: İlişkisel veri tabanlarında (PostgreSQL) ve analitik/sütun tabanlı veri tabanlarında (ClickHouse) deneyimli. * Mesajlaşma & Kuyruk Sistemleri: Kafka, Redis (caching/pub-sub) ve MQTT gibi teknolojileri projelerinde aktif olarak kullanmış, asenkron iletişim protokollerine hakim. * Containerization: Docker teknolojisini bilen, Dockerfile yazma ve container yönetimi süreçlerine aşina. Sizi Öne Çıkaracak Artılar * CI/CD süreçleri ve DevOps araçları konusunda temel bilgi sahibi olmak. * Clean Code prensiplerine ve test yazma (TDD) alışkanlığına sahip olmak.

title: Security Engineer - Node.js Proactive Defense
description: This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Security Engineer - Node.js Proactive Defense based in Turkey. We are looking for a highly autonomous Security Engineer to build a new generation of runtime protection for Node.js applications. This role offers the opportunity to create a product from the ground up, combining security research, engineering, and product ownership. You will design and implement solutions that protect modern web applications against evolving threats without requiring customer intervention. Working at the intersection of application security, malware detection, and runtime instrumentation, you will have ownership over both strategy and execution. You will leverage large-scale threat intelligence, modern engineering tools, and AI-assisted workflows to build impactful security capabilities. This is a hands-on role for someone who thrives in ambiguity, enjoys solving complex problems, and wants to make a measurable impact on web security. Accountabilities Define and build a new security product line focused on runtime protection within Node.js environments. Determine the technical strategy, including instrumentation methods, deployment models, programming language choices, and detection approaches. Design, develop, test, and iterate on the complete solution from concept through production deployment. Establish detection methodologies to distinguish malicious activity, vulnerabilities, and legitimate application behavior across diverse frameworks and libraries. Use large-scale security intelligence, including malware data, reputation signals, and threat feeds, to improve protection capabilities. Optimize the product against key security and business metrics, including runtime performance, false positives, false negatives, and customer impact. Collaborate with security specialists, architects, and engineering teams while maintaining ownership of technical direction and execution. Leverage AI-assisted development tools and modern engineering practices to accelerate delivery and improve quality. Monitor real-world customer telemetry and continuously improve detection logic and protection mechanisms. Requirements Strong experience with the Node.js runtime and JavaScript ecosystem. Solid understanding of web application security principles and current exploitation techniques. Ability to design detection logic that works reliably at scale while minimizing false positives. Experience building security tools, application protection solutions, runtime security products, or related engineering systems. Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to operate independently in a fast-moving environment. Ability to take ownership of product direction, architecture, engineering execution, and quality assurance. Comfortable working as a hands-on technical owner rather than only managing specifications or reviews. Experience using AI coding assistants and modern development workflows is a plus. Background in malware analysis, incident response, managed hosting environments, vulnerability research, or security research is highly valued. Experience publishing security research, creating vulnerability disclosures, or developing detection rulesets is a plus. Benefits Fully remote work environment with flexible working hours and the ability to work from anywhere worldwide. Opportunity to work on challenging security projects with direct impact on protecting modern web infrastructure. Strong focus on professional growth and continuous development. Paid annual vacation, public holidays, and flexible sick leave policy. Support for private medical insurance. Reimbursement support for co-working spaces and sports or wellness activities. Dedicated learning and education budget. Opportunity to be recognized and rewarded for innovative ideas and patented solutions. Access to modern engineering tools and resources to support high-impact development. How Jobgether Works We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team. We appreciate your interest and wish you the best! Why Apply Through Jobgether? Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Software Engineer - Backend”
description: Gamegos is an accomplished game company that has been developing top rated games since 2006, reaching millions of players worldwide. Join us to take part in making successful games with a team of highly talented people! Backend team responsibilities; Develop scalable and high-availability backend services that communicate live with online games Build workflows for analytics, live data processing, and system operations Develop web applications for managing and monitoring online games and backend services Design and manage the lifecycle of backend projects and their cloud infrastructure Desired qualifications; Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or similar Experience in at least one of our primary programming languages; Go (Golang), Python or Node.js Able to contribute to React.js and PHP based projects when necessary Experience in REST API and web service development Experience in relational (SQL) database systems and knowledge of document-oriented (NoSQL) databases Proficiency in object-oriented software design and OOP programming languages Loyalty to the software development principles and lifecycle Comfortable with working on LINUX systems (Ubuntu, Debian, Alpine etc) and distributed version control systems (we use Git) Interest in learning and implementing new technologies Nice to have; Software development of high-availability systems Unit testing, code coverage, code quality and security principles Database systems such as DynamoDB, MySQL, Amazon Redshift, Redis, Elasticsearch etc. Big data technologies & workflow management Cloud computing platforms, especially Amazon Web Services Microservices architecture, Docker and Kubernetes Continuous Integration/Delivery (CI/CD) and Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools such as Terraform, CloudFormation, OpenTofu etc.

title: Full Stack (AI) Developer
description: About the Company oobyte is a platform designed to empower users by enabling them to earn income continuously through their activities, transactions, and networks. By transforming everyday transactions into opportunities, oobyte introduces a new layer of income generation. The platform focuses on creating value for its users while fostering engagement and connectivity. Join oobyte to become part of a transformative approach to modern economic participation. Role Description This is a full-time, Remote role for a Full Stack (AI) Developer. You'll own features end-to-end on our AI-powered products. Frontend in React and Next.js, backend APIs, agentic workflows. You'll direct AI agents as your primary build tool and ship weekly. What you'll do Build full-stack features. React and Next.js on the frontend. Java, C#, or Node on the backend. Postgres, AWS, Vercel. React Native later as we expand mobile. Scale our agentic workflows. Internal AI tools, automations, content pipelines. Turn ideas into working prototypes in days. Ship weekly and own the outcome. No committee reviews. No tickets rotting in a backlog. What we need Strong programming background. Real CS fundamentals and shipped production experience. Solid React, Next.js, TypeScript. Backend depth. APIs, Postgres or MySQL, auth, caching, queues. Comfortable in Java, C#, or Node. AI-first mindset. Claude Code or Cursor as daily drivers. You know how to prompt, review output, and direct agents at scale. Git discipline and clean shipping habits. Written English good enough to work async with a distributed team. Nice to have React Native. Docker, Kubernetes. n8n or similar. Prior AI product work. Experience in mobile, fintech, or rewards/affiliate space. What we offer Competitive salary. We pay senior rates for senior output. Every AI tool you want, paid. Claude Max, Cursor Pro, API credits, whatever ships the feature. Hardware of your choice. Remote-first, async-friendly. We care about output, not hours at a desk. Direct access to the founder. Decisions happen in a Slack thread, not a steering committee. Our process Short intro call with HR. An Informal introductory talk with your potential manager. Take-home or pairing session on a real problem. Final call with the team. Expect an answer within a week of your first call!

title: Frontend Developer (React)
description: About the Job Company Description OBSS is Turkey’s largest technology consultancy, pioneering product development and technology consulting for an AI-native future. With more than 20 years of experience and offices in London, Istanbul, Ankara, we empower leading companies in banking and finance, insurance, e-commerce, retail, and the start-up ecosystem. Our team of over 1000 talented professionals thrives on collaboration, innovation, and continuous learning. We are now looking for a Frontend React Developer to join us and contribute to building high-quality, end-to-end solutions that create real business impact. OBSS is looking for a Frontend React Developer to join our dynamic team and contribute to delivering end-to-end software solutions across diverse industries. You will work on cutting-edge projects, collaborating with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and maintain high-quality applications that solve real business problems. Main Responsibilities Design, develop, and maintain scalable, reusable, and high-quality React applications Ensure application reliability, security, and performance in line with defense industry standards Collaborate with designers and backend developers to implement responsive and user-friendly solutions Participate in code reviews and contribute to best practices for frontend development Create and maintain technical documentation (component guides, architecture diagrams, test plans) Stay up to date with the latest frontend technologies and recommend improvements Communicate effectively with technical and non-technical stakeholders Qualifications / Technical Skills Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or related field Minimum 5 years of professional frontend development experience, including solid hands-on experience with React Solid knowledge of TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, and responsive design principles Experience in developing RESTful API integrations Familiarity with RxJS, NgRx or other state management libraries Knowledge of UI/UX best practices and design patterns Experience with CI/CD tools (e.g., Jenkins, GitLab CI, Bamboo) Proficiency in version control systems (Git) Strong problem-solving, analytical, and communication skills Ability to work collaboratively in agile teams with high motivation and energy Ability to approach AI with curiosity and intention, actively incorporating AI-powered tools into workflows to enhance productivity and drive innovation Additional Informations : Professional Growth & Learning As a tech company, we focus on reskilling and upskilling to support career growth. We offer a personalized Individual Growth Program (IGP), where employees set clear goals for each half of the year. These goals may include trainings, certifications, and personal development milestones, creating a structured roadmap for continuous improvement. The IGP helps employees strengthen both technical and soft skills, ensuring steady professional advancement. Company Culture and Values We celebrate diversity, inclusion, and equal opportunity, fostering a collaborative environment where innovation can flourish. Our culture emphasizes mentorship, knowledge sharing, and active participation in tech communities, workshops, and team events. This vibrant atmosphere empowers employees to contribute their best while feeling supported and valued. Benefits and Perks We provide competitive salaries, flexible and hybrid working arrangements, and a wide range of opportunities for growth through training programs, certifications, and workshops. In addition, we offer initiatives designed to build a supportive and engaging workplace where curiosity and collaboration are encouraged. These benefits ensure that employees feel motivated, empowered, and equipped to reach their full potential.

title: Frontend Developer (Vue.js)

With more than 20 years of experience and offices in London, Istanbul, Ankara, we empower leading companies in banking and finance, insurance, e-commerce, retail, and the start-up ecosystem. Our team of over 1000 talented professionals thrives on collaboration, innovation, and continuous learning. OBSS is looking for a Frontend Vue.js Developer to join our dynamic team and contribute to delivering end-to-end software solutions across diverse industries. Our culture emphasizes mentorship, knowledge sharing, and active participation in tech communities, workshops, and team events. title: Senior PHP Laravel Developer (Payment Facilitator/Payment Systems)
description: Sen Yeter ki İSTE! What We're Looking For Experience with Payment Facilitator (PF) or payment systems At least 5 years of experience with PHP , including both legacy and modern versions At least 3 years of hands-on experience with the Laravel framework Experience working with live production systems Experience in REST API development and third-party integrations Strong understanding of the MVC (Model–View–Controller) architectural pattern Knowledge of SQL-based databases Proficiency with Git , logging, and production debugging Strong problem-solving skills, analytical thinking, and a questioning technical mindset Ability to understand projects from a business perspective Solid understanding of system architecture , with the ability to add new features while maintaining code simplicity and robustness Experience participating in code reviews and writing defensive code Awareness of code performance and long-term maintainability Ability to communicate effectively with the Tech Lead and cross-functional teams Ability to clearly explain system behavior and design to other team members Capability to address small code issues quickly and plan for resolving larger technical debt Ability to adapt to changes in technology and project requirements Ensuring features function correctly post-release Ability to question the value of requested changes in relation to increased complexity and development cost Commitment to delivering bug-free features and proactively investigating bug reports Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with technical English proficiency Experience running or observing applications in Docker / Kubernetes environments Experience with Redis, queues, and cron jobs #kariyerinilerisideniz Deniz’de Kariyer Fırsatlarına göstermiş olduğunuz ilgi için teşekkür ederiz. Bankamız ve İnsan Kaynakları uygulamalarımız hakkında daha fazla bilgiye sahip olmak için kurumsal sayfamızı ve sosyal medya hesaplarımızı takip edebilirsin. Başvurunuz nedeni ile paylaşmış olduğunuz veriler 6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu (“KVKK”) kapsamında korunmakta ve işlenmektedir. Ayrıntılı bilgi için https://basvuru.denizbank.com/KVKK.aspx adresini ziyaret edebilirsiniz.

title: Full Stack Software Developer
description: Ataves Santi is a technology venture focused on accelerating digital transformation in the energy sector through intelligent and innovative software solutions. Guided by a vision of renewable energy and a more sustainable future, we develop end-to-end solutions for energy monitoring, management, and optimization. Our solutions are trusted by a diverse range of organizations, including energy-intensive industries, hospitals, hotels, educational institutions, commercial buildings, organized industrial zones and public sector organizations, helping them improve operational efficiency and achieve their sustainability goals. What You'll Do Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend and frontend components for web applications, Analyze technical requirements and propose efficient software solutions, Design and develop RESTful APIs, GraphQL services, and system integrations, Create and optimize database structures, data models, and SQL queries for high performance, Ensure our applications meet security, scalability, and performance standards, Build seamless integrations between backend services and frontend applications, Write clean, maintainable, and reusable code following software engineering best practices, Participate actively in code reviews and contribute to continuous improvement of code quality, Develop and maintain unit and integration tests to ensure software reliability, Troubleshoot production issues, identify root causes, and implement sustainable solutions, Prepare and maintain technical documentation throughout the software development lifecycle, Collaborate with cross-functional teams in Agile/Scrum ceremonies and deliver sprint commitments on time. What We're Looking For Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or a related field. Minimum 5 years of professional experience in full stack web application development. Strong experience with backend and frontend development. Solid understanding of software architecture, API development, and database design. Experience developing scalable and secure enterprise web applications. Technical Skills PHP Laravel JavaScript Vue.js (or similar modern JavaScript frameworks) RESTful API development GraphQL (preferred) SQL databases Git version control Knowledge of software design principles and best practices

title: Backend Developer / .NET Developer
description: Ekibimize katılacak, backend yazılım geliştirme süreçlerinde aktif rol alacak Backend Developer / .NET Developer arıyoruz. Genel Nitelikler Üniversitelerin mühendislik bölümlerinden mezun, tercihen Bilgisayar Mühendisliği mezunu, Tercihen bankacılık sektöründe yazılım geliştirme alanında en az 3 yıl profesyonel deneyime sahip, Microsoft .NET teknolojilerine ve C# diline hakim, .NET Core ve Entity Framework Core konularında deneyimli, OOP, Design Patterns, Clean Code, SOLID, DDD ve TDD prensipleri konusunda bilgi ve deneyim sahibi, MS SQL, T-SQL ve performans tuning konularında deneyimli, Mikroservis mimarisini anlayan ve bu doğrultuda geliştirme yapabilecek, Container teknolojileriyle çalışmış, tercihen Kubernetes hakkında bilgi sahibi, Redis, Elasticsearch, Kafka veya RabbitMQ gibi açık kaynak teknolojiler hakkında bilgi sahibi, Git, TFS ve Azure DevOps süreçlerinde deneyimli, Unit Test yazımı ve test edilebilir yazılım geliştirme yaklaşımlarına hakim, Analitik düşünme ve problem çözme becerileri gelişmiş, Teknolojik literatürü takip edebilecek seviyede İngilizce bilgisine sahip, Değişime ve öğrenmeye açık, güncel teknolojileri takip eden ve kendini geliştirmeye istekli. Görev ve Sorumluluklar Backend yazılım geliştirme süreçlerinde aktif rol almak, Yeni özelliklerin geliştirilmesini ve mevcut servislerin iyileştirilmesini sağlamak, Güvenli, performanslı ve sürdürülebilir backend servisleri geliştirmek, Mikroservis mimarisine uygun servis tasarımı ve geliştirme çalışmalarına katkı sağlamak, Veritabanı tasarımı, sorgu optimizasyonu ve performans iyileştirme çalışmalarını yürütmek, API geliştirme, entegrasyon ve servis iletişimi süreçlerinde görev almak, Kod kalitesi, sürdürülebilirlik ve test edilebilirlik standartlarına uygun geliştirme yapmak, Code Review süreçlerine katılarak ekip içi kalite standartlarının korunmasına destek olmak, Teknik analiz, mimari tasarım, geliştirme, test ve bakım süreçlerine katkı sağlamak, DevOps, iş analizi, kalite güvence ve ürün ekipleriyle koordineli çalışmak. Tercihen Beklenen Yetkinlikler Bankacılık veya finans sektöründe yazılım geliştirme deneyimine sahip olmak, Krediler, tahsis, mali tahlil, teminat, istihbarat, risk analizi veya kredi kullandırım süreçlerinde deneyimli olmak, Kubernetes, Docker ve container orchestration süreçleri hakkında bilgi sahibi olmak, Kafka, RabbitMQ, Redis veya Elasticsearch teknolojilerinden biriyle production ortamında çalışmış olmak, Azure DevOps pipeline, CI/CD ve release süreçlerinde görev almış olmak, DDD, TDD ve Clean Architecture yaklaşımlarıyla geliştirme deneyimine sahip olmak, Yüksek hacimli transaction işleyen sistemlerde performans ve ölçeklenebilirlik çalışmaları yapmış olmak. Aranan Profil Teknik sorumluluk alabilen, kaliteli kod üretmeye önem veren, backend mimarisi ve sürdürülebilir yazılım geliştirme konularında deneyimli, ekip çalışmasına yatkın bir takım arkadaşı arıyoruz.
